summary: Frontend testing of hero deduplication in SetupScreen dropdowns. All 5 core deduplication behaviors verified and passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero deduplication fully working. usedHeroSet computed on each render; each slot filters out heroes selected in other slots. Tested: Murphy selected in slot 1 → absent from slot 2 ✓; Murphy+Kimberly in slots 1+2 → both absent from slot 3 ✓; slot 1 reset to None → Murphy available again in slot 2 ✓; all 3 optgroups (TANK/AIRCRAFT/MISSILE) present ✓; 26 heroes total across optgroups for empty slot ✓; reactive update (Murphy→Kimberly in slot 1) works correctly ✓.

test_results.murphy-filtered-from-slot2: PASS - Murphy absent from slot 2 options after selecting in slot 1
test_results.murphy-kimberly-filtered-from-slot3: PASS - Both Murphy and Kimberly absent from slot 3
test_results.slot1-none-restores-murphy-in-slot2: PASS - Murphy available again in slot 2 after slot 1 reset to None
test_results.26-heroes-total: PASS - 26 heroes (None + 26 = 27 options) in empty slot with no other selections
test_results.reactive-update: PASS - Changing slot 1 from Murphy to Kimberly correctly updates availability in other slots
